reasons.16: With high correlation (ρ=0.90) and moderate noise (σ²=0.1), others' sharing likely causes significant base leakage. My marginal privacy cost from sharing is reduced due to submodularity. The offer p=0.0320 exceeds my expected marginal cost (v=0.553 times low marginal disclosure), making sharing beneficial.
